title: Course Introduction - Fill in the Blank

questions.question: Name the written team contract covering roles, deadlines, and conflict resolution.
questions.blank_sentence: Each group must produce a Team Expectations ___, a contract on roles, deadlines, and conflict resolution.
questions.explanation: The Team Expectations Agreement (TEP) is the written contract that sets out roles, deadlines, and how the team resolves conflict.

questions.question: Give the percentage weight of the exam in the final grade.
questions.blank_sentence: The exam contributes ___% of the final grade, while the paper contributes the remaining 40%.
questions.explanation: The assessment is 40% paper and 60% exam, so the exam carries 60% of the final grade.

questions.question: Name the compliance step that, with informed consent, must be completed before data collection.
questions.blank_sentence: Before collecting data, the team must complete Ethical Standards ___ together with the informed consent template.
questions.explanation: Ethical Standards Compliance plus an informed consent template are required before any data collection begins.

questions.question: Name the statement in which students declare any GenAI or tooling they used.
questions.blank_sentence: Students must submit a ___ Statement declaring any GenAI or tooling used in the project.
questions.explanation: The Technology Statement is the required declaration of any GenAI or tooling used during the project.

questions.question: State the minimum number of conditions a project must include.
questions.blank_sentence: A project must compare at least ___ conditions to meet the minimum requirements.
questions.explanation: The minimum requirements specify at least 2 conditions, with at least 20 participants per condition.

questions.question: State the minimum number of participants required per condition.
questions.blank_sentence: Each condition must include at least ___ participants under the minimum project requirements.
questions.explanation: The minimum requirements call for at least 20 participants per condition, alongside at least 2 conditions and R or Python analysis.

questions.question: Name the learning-management platform where slides, templates, and example papers are hosted.
questions.blank_sentence: Slides, transcripts, templates, example papers, and the schedule are held in the ___ modules.
questions.explanation: Canvas modules hold the slides, transcripts, templates, example papers, and schedule, and students also self-enroll in topic groups there.

questions.question: Name the framework used to handle free-riders in teams.
questions.blank_sentence: Free-riders are addressed using the Hitchhikers and Couch ___ framework.
questions.explanation: The Hitchhikers and Couch Potatoes framework is the named approach for handling free-riders within groups.

questions.question: Name the two-letter track that pairs with Machine-Learning (ML) on the topic menu.
questions.blank_sentence: Supervisor topics fall on either the ___ (Human-Studies) side or the ML side.
questions.explanation: The topic menu is split into the Human-Studies (HS) side and the Machine-Learning (ML) side, each with different example proposals.

questions.question: Name the required planning artefact provided as a spreadsheet.
questions.blank_sentence: The Project Schedule ___, provided as an xlsx file, is a required planning artefact.
questions.explanation: The Project Schedule Template (xlsx) is a required planning artefact for laying out the project timeline.
